name: Bee Gees
bio: The Bee Gees still monetize at a high level because the Saturday Night Fever-era catalog remains globally recognizable and unusually reusable in film, TV, and playlist culture.
notable_for: Disco-era songwriting, soundtrack dominance, and enduring crossover hits.
career_highlight: Saturday Night Fever songs remain among the most replayed and licensed disco recordings in the catalog economy.
